subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath spoken the truth and sent down verses as He willeth. There is no God but Him, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من نطق بالحق و انزل الایات کیف اراد لا اله الا هو العلیم الخبیر انا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
